aws.directoryservice.resource.directorys.metadata_intent: Check that directory log forwarding is enabled (LogSubscriptions with DirectoryId and LogGroupName exist)
issues_found: Wrong discovery: used aws.ds.list_schema_extensions (which called describe_directories) instead of list_log_subscriptions
Discovery emit used item: instead of items_for: for array response
Field paths were item.LogSubscriptions.DirectoryId instead of item.DirectoryId
fixes_applied: Added list_log_subscriptions discovery with items_for pattern
Fixed field paths from item.LogSubscriptions.* to item.*

aws.directoryservice.resource.supported_.metadata_intent: Check that MFA RADIUS is enabled (RadiusSettings exists and RadiusStatus equals Completed)
aws.directoryservice.resource.supported_.yaml_checks: Checks item.RadiusSettings exists and item.RadiusStatus equals Completed
issues_found: Discovery emit used item: instead of items_for: for DirectoryDescriptions array
RadiusStatus was missing from emit structure
fixes_applied: Changed describe_directories emit to use items_for pattern
